tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: My friends are inviting me to Echo tonight, but my midterm tomorrow means I should probably prioritize finishing my review first.
I just declined Mina's invitation to Echo tonight, which aligns with my earlier decision to prioritize finishing my midterm review given the exam is tomorrow.
I advanced my midterm prep significantly but missed the social opportunity with friends, confirming that studying was the right choice despite the lost connection.
I made significant progress on my midterm review, bringing it to 92% completion. This confirms that prioritizing studying over social events was the right decision given tomorrow's exam.
Joining the social club after prioritizing my midterm review shows I can balance academic focus with social connection without sacrificing either.
I completed 92% of my midterm prep before the deadline, so I can now focus on finishing the last 8% while managing low stress.
My midterm study is now 100% complete, so I have fully secured my academic goal for today and can shift focus to other priorities.
Since my midterm prep is complete and the social club welcomed me, I feel confident balancing both academic success and social connection.

agent.last_reasoning: Club is resolved and study goal met (100% progress). Sleep recovers energy for Sunday laundry while ending the day efficiently.
